action.description:
Introduced by Senators Habush Sinykin, Smith, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, L. Johnson, Larson, Ratcliff, Roys and Wirch; 
cosponsored by Representatives Miresse, Palmeri, Anderson, Andraca, Arney, Bare, DeSmidt, Emerson, Hysell, Joers, Roe, Sinicki, Stroud, Subeck, Tenorio and Vining
